The medals can survive a 3-meter drop with only minor cracks. So the main concern here is about the jade rings being fragile and breaking. The key words are "risk of fragility" and the drop tests. Let's look at the options: A) the medals will be worth less – The passage doesn't mention anything about the monetary value or worth of the medals, so probably not A.
